title: hieracium bourgaei subsp. eliasii
intro: Hieracium bourgaei subsp. eliasii, also known as a type of Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion genus. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium bourgaei subsp. eliasii include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. In herbal preparations, it is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions when used under medical supervision.
